description.ko: ECHO-0는 음파를 복잡한 기하학적 패턴과 빛의 펄스로 변환하는 첨단 시청각 설치물입니다. 실시간 모션 그래픽을 통해 보이지 않는 음향 데이터의 물리적 구현을 탐구합니다.
description.en: ECHO-0 is an advanced audio-visual installation that translates sound waves into complex geometric patterns and light pulses. It explores the physical manifestation of invisible acoustic data through real-time motion graphics.

prompt: Cinematic 8k rendering of ECHO-0, a futuristic sound visualization sculpture, vibrating holographic wave patterns, glowing neon light particles reacting to bass frequencies, sleek metallic structure, dark ambient studio lighting, volumetric lighting, abstract data art, cybernetic aesthetic.
